meaning: n.(陶器,玻璃器皿的)贴花釉法,贴花纸
examples: The decal does not adhere to the window.
Where is the other decal for this airplane?
You can also see where the decal is all screwed up!
Introduced last year, the DXM is made from layered sheets of wood fiber covered with decal photographs of spruce and mahogany grain.
Slap a Rat Fink decal on your lunch box and suddenly you had a talisman that could repulse teachers, adults and other bores.
